extracted_ingredients: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 green bell pepper, finely sliced (about 1 cup)
1 red bell pepper, finely sliced (about 1 cup)
1 tablespoon sweet Spanish smoked paprika (or regular paprika)
1 teaspoon dried marjoram (savory or oregano will also work just fine)
3 cups homemade or low-sodium canned chicken stock
1 large tomato, peeled, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
extracted_instructions: Serve this with egg noodles, spätzle, rice, or boiled potatoes.

NOTE : You can make this dish completely on the stovetop by lowering the heat to the lowest possible setting when you add the chicken in step 4, covering the pan, and cooking until the chicken is tender, about 45 minutes.

schemaorg_recipe.description: Serve this with egg noodles, spätzle, rice, or boiled potatoes.
schemaorg_recipe.name: EASY SKILLET-BRAISED CHICKEN WITH PEPPERS AND ONIONS
recipeIngredient: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
1 green bell pepper, finely sliced (about 1 cup)
1 red bell pepper, finely sliced (about 1 cup)
1 tablespoon sweet Spanish smoked paprika (or regular paprika)
1 teaspoon dried marjoram (savory or oregano will also work just fine)
3 cups homemade or low-sodium canned chicken stock
1 large tomato, peeled, seeded, and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions: Serve this with egg noodles, spätzle, rice, or boiled potatoes.

NOTE : You can make this dish completely on the stovetop by lowering the heat to the lowest possible setting when you add the chicken in step 4, covering the pan, and cooking until the chicken is tender, about 45 minutes.
